requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 — 辐射及传导发射
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 — 輻射及傳導發射

summary.en: Under the CE/RED route adopted by North Macedonia, wireless devices must demonstrate EMC conformity against EN harmonised emissions standards. EN 55032 (CISPR 32) covers radiated and conducted emissions for multimedia equipment. EN 61000-3-2 applies to harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase, and EN 61000-3-3 covers voltage fluctuations and flicker. Test reports must reference these EN/CISPR standards explicitly; GB-only test reports are not accepted as standalone evidence of conformity.
summary.zh: 根据北马其顿采用的CE/RED路径，无线设备须依据EN协调发射标准证明电磁兼容合规性。EN 55032（CISPR 32）涵盖多媒体设备的辐射及传导发射。EN 61000-3-2适用于每相输入电流不超过16A的设备的谐波电流发射，EN 61000-3-3涵盖电压波动和闪烁。测试报告须明确引用上述EN/CISPR标准；仅引用GB标准的测试报告不被接受为单独的合规证明。
summary.zht: 根據北馬其頓採用的CE/RED路徑，無線裝置須依據EN協調發射標準證明電磁相容合規性。EN 55032（CISPR 32）涵蓋多媒體設備的輻射及傳導發射。EN 61000-3-2適用於每相輸入電流不超過16A的設備的諧波電流發射，EN 61000-3-3涵蓋電壓波動和閃爍。測試報告須明確引用上述EN/CISPR標準；僅引用GB標準的測試報告不被接受為單獨的合規證明。

standards_or_laws: EU Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC Directive, applicable via RED technical file)
Law on Electronic Communications of North Macedonia (Official Gazette 39/2014)

summary.en: In China, EMC emissions requirements for information technology and multimedia equipment are governed by GB/T 9254.1 (equivalent to CISPR 32) for radiated and conducted emissions, and GB/T 17625.1 (equivalent to IEC 61000-3-2) for harmonic current emissions. These are tested as part of CCC certification or voluntary SRRC compliance.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术及多媒体设备的电磁兼容发射要求由GB/T 9254.1（等同于CISPR 32，涵盖辐射及传导发射）和GB/T 17625.1（等同于IEC 61000-3-2，涵盖谐波电流发射）规定。这些标准作为CCC认证或自愿性SRRC合规的一部分进行测试。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術及多媒體設備的電磁相容發射要求由GB/T 9254.1（等同於CISPR 32，涵蓋輻射及傳導發射）和GB/T 17625.1（等同於IEC 61000-3-2，涵蓋諧波電流發射）規定。這些標準作為CCC認證或自願性SRRC合規的一部分進行測試。

gap.en: Chinese GB test reports are technically derived from equivalent CISPR/IEC bases but are not accepted as standalone CE conformity evidence. EN 55032 and EN 61000-3-2/-3-3 test reports from an accredited laboratory (preferably ILAC/APLAC MRA recognised) must be included in the CE technical file submitted or made available to AEK.
gap.zh: 中国GB测试报告在技术上源自等效的CISPR/IEC基础，但不被接受为单独的CE合规证明。须在提交或向AEK提供的CE技术文件中包含经认可实验室（最好是ILAC/APLAC MRA认可）出具的EN 55032及EN 61000-3-2/-3-3测试报告。
gap.zht: 中國GB測試報告在技術上源自等效的CISPR/IEC基礎，但不被接受為單獨的CE合規證明。須在提交或向AEK提供的CE技術文件中包含經認可實驗室（最好是ILAC/APLAC MRA認可）出具的EN 55032及EN 61000-3-2/-3-3測試報告。

source.publisher: AEK — Agency for Electronic Communications, North Macedonia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 9254.1 test data may be leveraged as a starting reference but cannot substitute for EN 55032 test reports. Accredited EN/CISPR-referenced testing is required for CE technical file completeness under AEK market surveillance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 9254.1测试数据可作为参考依据，但不能替代EN 55032测试报告。在AEK市场监管下，完整的CE技术文件要求经认可的EN/CISPR参考测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 9254.1測試數據可作為參考依據，但不能替代EN 55032測試報告。在AEK市場監管下，完整的CE技術文件要求經認可的EN/CISPR參考測試。

summary.en: North Macedonia's CE/RED framework requires wireless devices to demonstrate immunity to electromagnetic disturbances per EN 55035 (CISPR 35) for multimedia equipment immunity, supported by the IEC 61000-4 series (electrostatic discharge, radiated immunity, electrical fast transient, surge, conducted immunity, power frequency magnetic field, and voltage dips). Immunity test reports must reference EN standards and be included in the CE technical file.
summary.zh: 北马其顿CE/RED框架要求无线设备依据EN 55035（CISPR 35）证明多媒体设备的电磁抗扰度，并辅以IEC 61000-4系列标准（静电放电、辐射抗扰度、电快速瞬变、浪涌、传导抗扰度、工频磁场及电压暂降）。抗扰度测试报告须引用EN标准，并纳入CE技术文件。
summary.zht: 北馬其頓CE/RED框架要求無線裝置依據EN 55035（CISPR 35）證明多媒體設備的電磁抗擾度，並輔以IEC 61000-4系列標準（靜電放電、輻射抗擾度、電快速瞬變、浪湧、傳導抗擾度、工頻磁場及電壓暫降）。抗擾度測試報告須引用EN標準，並納入CE技術文件。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61000-4-4 — Electrical fast transient / burst
EN IEC 61000-4-11 — Voltage dips and interruptions

summary.en: Chinese immunity requirements for IT and multimedia equipment are covered by GB/T 9254.2 (equivalent to CISPR 35) and GB/T 17618 (equivalent to IEC 61000-4 series). These form part of the CCC certification scope for applicable product categories.
summary.zh: 中国信息技术及多媒体设备的抗扰度要求由GB/T 9254.2（等同于CISPR 35）和GB/T 17618（等同于IEC 61000-4系列）规定，是CCC认证适用产品类别范围的一部分。
summary.zht: 中國資訊技術及多媒體設備的抗擾度要求由GB/T 9254.2（等同於CISPR 35）和GB/T 17618（等同於IEC 61000-4系列）規定，是CCC認證適用產品類別範圍的一部分。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618-2015 (IT equipment immunity, equivalent to IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: CCC immunity test data referencing GB standards alone does not satisfy North Macedonia CE/AEK requirements. EN 55035 and relevant IEC 61000-4 series test reports from an accredited laboratory are required in the CE technical file. Gap is procedural rather than technical given the close alignment of GB and EN immunity standards.
gap.zh: 仅引用GB标准的CCC抗扰度测试数据不满足北马其顿CE/AEK要求。CE技术文件中须包含经认可实验室出具的EN 55035及相关IEC 61000-4系列测试报告。鉴于GB与EN抗扰度标准高度一致，差距主要体现在程序层面而非技术层面。
gap.zht: 僅引用GB標準的CCC抗擾度測試數據不滿足北馬其頓CE/AEK要求。CE技術文件中須包含經認可實驗室出具的EN 55035及相關IEC 61000-4系列測試報告。鑑於GB與EN抗擾度標準高度一致，差距主要體現在程序層面而非技術層面。

source.publisher: AEK — Agency for Electronic Communications, North Macedonia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 9254.2 and GB/T 17618 immunity data may support gap analysis but EN 55035 / IEC 61000-4 series test reports referenced in the CE technical file are required for AEK market surveillance compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 9254.2和GB/T 17618抗扰度数据可支持差距分析，但CE技术文件中引用的EN 55035 / IEC 61000-4系列测试报告是AEK市场监管合规的必要条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 9254.2和GB/T 17618抗擾度數據可支持差距分析，但CE技術文件中引用的EN 55035 / IEC 61000-4系列測試報告是AEK市場監管合規的必要條件。
